svg.title: Cassette 480 V AC auxiliary — AUX-1 CDU and AUX-2 Munters feeds
svg.desc: Two independent 480 V AC three-phase feeds entering at the CDU ECP. AUX-1 feeds the CoolIT CHx2000 CDU through an 80 A IEC 60309 connector and 25 mm² conductor to a subpanel. AUX-2 feeds the external Munters HCD-600 skid through an 80 A IEC 60309 connector and 16 mm² conductor directly to the skid.
svg.text: Cassette 480 V AC auxiliary — CDU and Munters feeds
Two independent 3-ph feeds at CDU ECP. Rev 2.1 corrections applied (60 A → 80 A, 10 mm² → 25 mm²).

g.text: 480 V AC 3-ph · 40 kW cont / 55 kW peak
External skid · 30 kW running / 40 kW peak

svg.text: AUX-1 and AUX-2 are independent feeds — loss of one does not de-energize the other.
Both pass through CDU ECP (not ELEC ECP). CDU ECP recessed housing depth is 400 mm to fit these.
CoolIT actual draw open item E-03 (ELEC-001 §18) — 40 kW is Scott's RFQ estimate, not vendor-confirmed.
Conductor ampacities assume 90°C insulation in tray / conduit per NEC 310.15(B)(16).
AUX-2 cable spec (4× 16 mm²) was correct in BOM Rev 1.0 — no change needed, Munters had adequate sizing from the start.
